name: Carrot'n' Raisin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs, granulated sugar, ground nutmeg, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, granulated sugar, flour, eggs, and orange juice. Mix until well blended.
3. Add the shredded carrots, raisins, ground ginger, additional orange juice, and remaining spices to the cream cheese mixture. Mix until combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared crust and bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for an additional 55 minutes, or until set.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill completely.
6. In a small bowl, combine the remaining cream cheese with orange juice. Mix until well blended.
7. Gradually add the powdered sugar to the mixture, mixing until smooth. Spread over the top of the chilled cheesecake.
8. Garnish with additional raisins and finely shredded carrots, if desired.
